reference: BUT IF HE WERE DESTINED TO MEET HIS MYRTILUS AND HIS MOTHER IN THE WORLD BEYOND THE GRAVE WHAT HAD HE NOT TO TELL THEM HOW SURE HE WAS OF FINDING A JOYFUL RECEPTION THERE FROM BOTH
text: but if he were destined to meet his myrtiless and his mother in the world beyond the grave what had he not to tell them how sure he was of finding a joyful reception there from both
